03 Step 1 Identifying Dashboard Categories - YouTube.mp4
The first step to building out your company's dashboard is to define the dashboard's categories. These categories are the top-level organization that all your different metrics and key performance indicators will fall under. And the great news is you have already completed this step without even realizing it. That's right, if we go back to the high output team canvas, remember that? You'll recall that the first step of the process was to identify the core functional business units that you use to organize and operationalize your company. In other words, what are the teams that make up your company's organizational structure? Now, since we already answered this question back in the previous session, we can simply pull over all those same... categories and use them to define our dashboard categories. If it was good enough for your high output team canvas, then it's good enough for your company scorecard. So again, don't spend a lot of time on this step. Just copy over the teams and categories from your high output team canvas to your company scorecard. When you've done that, you're ready to move on to the next step.
